headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 18, 2026**
article:
The Chicago Cubs dominated the New York Mets in a 12-4 victory, while the Baltimore Orioles secured a 6-4 win over the Cleveland Guardians. The Atlanta Braves blasted the Philadelphia Phillies 9-0, and the San Francisco Giants took down the Washington Nationals 10-5.

Injuries and availability continue to impact teams, with several players landing on the injured list. Chicago Cubs right-handed pitcher Cade Horton has been transferred to the 60-day injured list due to a right forearm strain. New York Mets second baseman Jorge Polanco was placed on the 10-day injured list with a right wrist contusion, while Seattle Mariners first baseman Patrick Wisdom was placed on the 15-day injured list with a left oblique strain.

Several trades and roster moves have taken place, including the Los Angeles Dodgers acquiring right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott in a trade with the Baltimore Orioles. The Dodgers sent right-handed pitcher Axel Perez to the Orioles in exchange for McDermott. The New York Mets traded left-handed pitcher Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash, while the Milwaukee Brewers acquired right-handed pitcher Junior Fernández from the Arizona Diamondbacks.

top_news.title: **Cubs Cruise Past Mets 12-4**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs dominated the New York Mets in a lopsided 12-4 victory, securing their win. Moisés Ballesteros led the Mets' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Orioles Take Down Guardians 6-4**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a 6-4 victory over the Cleveland Guardians, with Daniel Schneemann leading the offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs. Rico Garcia earned the win, while Ryan Helsley secured the save.

top_news.title: **Braves Blast Phillies 9-0**
top_news.summary: The Atlanta Braves dominated the Philadelphia Phillies, securing a 9-0 victory. Austin Riley led the Braves' offense with a pair of home runs and four RBIs.

top_news.title: **Giants Take Down Nationals 10-5**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants secured a 10-5 victory over the Washington Nationals, with Logan Webb earning the win. Heliot Ramos led the Giants' offense with a home run, four RBIs, and a 1-for-4 batting line.

top_news.title: **Cubs' Cade Horton Shifts to 60-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Chicago Cubs right-handed pitcher Cade Horton has been transferred from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to a right forearm strain.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Acquire RHP Chayce McDermott in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers have made a move to bolster their pitching staff, acquiring right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott in a trade. McDermott joins the Dodgers after being dealt from the Baltimore Orioles.
